job.title: Systems & Networks Project Manager
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Lead systems and network infrastructure projects in Avignon. You coordinate the technical teams and ensure project delivery within deadlines and the expected quality.
mission.1: Scope and lead S&R infrastructure projects
mission.2: Coordinate network, system, and security teams
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science, networks, or management
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience managing infrastructure projects
profile.3: Good knowledge of storage and recovery environments
profile.4: PMP or PRINCE2 certification is a plus
profile.5: Leadership et sens de la communication
